notes: Sender-aid output was used to normalize mixed-encoding decomp evidence.
One or more suspects currently look like periodic/state-report traffic rather than a direct handoff blocker.
The first world frame must include the local player's appearance block or the client can sit on the loading screen with a valid world connection but nothing to render.

playerInfo.recommendedNextAction: Verify why PLAYER_INFO collapses to repeated 3-byte frames after the initial appearance burst.
